[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000001010 2
1 100101011 5
2 000000000 a
3 100001010 3
4 100101011 5
5 000001000 1
6 100101011 5
7 000000000 a

01 10 100000001 2
12 21 100000001 2
23 32 100101011 5 match 1 4 6
34 43 101001010 4
45 54 011110101 6
56 65 110100010 4
67 76 110110011 6
70 07 010000101 3

02 20 000000000 a match 2 7
13 31 000101010 3
24 42 001100001 3
35 53 110111111 8

60 06 100110110 5
71 17 110000100 3

61 16 000110111 5
